chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-856 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 28.10.2025 Mr.Ahsan Ali Bhurgri, Advocate for the applicants Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G ********** The applicants are present on interim bail. Learned counsel for the applicants has placed a statement on record, attaching a copy of the Order dated 20.10.2025, passed by the Court of Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-I, Badin and submits that the applicants have been acquitted in the subject FIR. In view of the same, learned counsel does not wish to press this bail application. Accordingly, the bail application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
